title: Pepsi Next | The Internet Taste Test
summary: Pepsi Next had real cola taste with 60% less sugar, but you can't drink it through a computer. So we built the next best thing: the Internet Taste Test, where UCB improv actors used your Facebook data to become you and tried Pepsi Next on your behalf.
body: Pepsi Next had real cola taste with 60% less sugar, and you really did have to drink it to believe it. The problem: you can't drink a Pepsi Next through a computer screen. So we built the next best thing, the Internet Taste Test. An Improv You (a UCB comedian) used your Facebook profile data to assume the role of Real You, tried Pepsi Next on your behalf, and sent you a personalized video showing exactly how much you liked it.
We shot 500 videos in four days with 20 UCB improv actors, and kicked off the launch with Rob Riggle to put a recognizable face on the first wave.
